meta.tagline: The business bank built for founders.
meta.icp: Venture-backed and bootstrapped startups, 2–50 employees, United States.

channels.label: Paid search
channels.blurb: Google high-intent keywords (business banking, startup account)

channels.label: Content / SEO
channels.blurb: Founder finance guides, runway calculators, comparison pages

channels.label: Lifecycle email
channels.blurb: Nurture of existing leads & waitlist to activation

channels.label: Partnerships
channels.blurb: Accelerators, VC platform teams, founder communities

segments.label: VC-backed
segments.blurb: Raised institutional capital; spend faster, higher balances, team seats.

segments.label: Bootstrapped
segments.blurb: Revenue-funded; price-sensitive, sticky, lower but durable balances.

competitors.name: Contoso Bank
competitors.weakness: Slow onboarding, branch-era UX, nothing startup-specific.

competitors.name: Fabrikam Financial
competitors.weakness: No runway view or cap-table-aware features; generic SMB positioning.

competitors.name: Zava Capital
competitors.weakness: High fees and gated behind a VC introduction.

personas.label: Founder / CEO
personas.jtbd: Open an account in minutes, see runway in real time, move money without friction.

personas.label: Finance lead / Ops
personas.jtbd: Control spend, automate AP, and close the books faster.
